title: Reintegrated: Arts and Crafts
description: Integrating Arts and Crafts into vanilla biomes and structures.
body:
# Reintegrated: Arts and Crafts

This mod aims to smoothly integrate the blocks from the Arts and Crafts mod into vanilla's biomes and structures. This includes features such as:

- Dyed decorated pots in Trial Chambers
- Cork wood in Shipwrecks and Savanna Villages
- Dungeons in Deserts made out of Gypsum

...and more!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Kqm3ZqFI/images/8e109d5f979b18d0b3b9bda94d90fe547ece4d00.png)
